artifact: TOBench paper and timing-aware official release acquisition

paper.title: TOBench: A Task-Oriented Omni-Modal Benchmark for Real-World Tool-Using Agents
paper.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

inventory_observations: The pinned archive passed a complete ZIP CRC test and contains 967 regular files; the GitHub recursive tree response was not truncated during scouting.

The extracted release contains 200 JSON files recursively under pipeline/data and 200 JSON files recursively under pipeline/distill/outputs. These are file counts, not a finding that the release contains 200 independent benchmark tasks.

The release contains 27 YAML files directly under server_tools/common and three files under pipeline/evaluation: prompt.py, eval_criteria.py, and reference_evaluation_code.py. Acquisition did not validate the paper's 324-tool count or evaluator behavior.
The README directs users to download the executable task dataset separately from Hugging Face AI-Safeguard/TOBenchURL; the pinned GitHub archive itself has no tasks/ tree in its top-level inventory.

A conservative filename inventory found no packaged paper-run result, trace, trajectory, human-audit, or human-baseline files. This is an acquisition observation requiring confirmation during deep review, not a release-completeness conclusion.
release.timing_boundary: The pinned commit predates immutable arXiv v1 publication by 4 days, 20 hours, 29 minutes, and 49 seconds. This makes it timing-appropriate official evidence, but does not establish byte identity with the code, tasks, models, services, or evaluator configuration used for the paper's experiments.

text_spot_checks: title, authors, abstract, immutable arXiv v1 marker, and official repository URL
method/system prompts, evaluator discussion, and detailed error taxonomy
appendix trajectories, intermediate-artifact inspection example, and final manuscript page
verification.source_archive_test: tarfile parse succeeded; 39 members and 39 regular files including manuscript source/assets and figures
verification.release_archive_test: ZIP CRC test succeeded for all 1,340 members

acquisition_scope: Created verifiable local full-paper, immutable source, and timing-aware pinned-release evidence for the queued review. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep paper/repository audit, benchmark replay, score reproduction, closed-loop self-correction finding, evaluator-accuracy claim, human-parity claim, professional-validity claim, production-fitness claim, or readiness claim.
